config.text:
Map 1: All WRI Trailers

Map 2: Trailer "To Do's"

where.displaySQL: (Observations = 'Injured Wildlife') or (Observations = 'Oil Spotted') or (Observations = 'Other Obs') or (Observations = 'River Hazard')

where.sql: (response_actions_wri = 'aid_station') OR (response_actions_wri = 'boat_ramp') OR (response_actions_wri = 'current_boom_site') OR (response_actions_wri = 'hospital') OR (response_actions_wri = 'Incident_Command_Post') OR (response_actions_wri = 'landing_zone') OR (response_actions_wri = 'other_action') OR (response_actions_wri = 'planned_boom_site') OR (response_actions_wri = 'Planned_Staging_Area') OR (response_actions_wri = 'Planned_Staging_Area') OR (response_actions_wri = 'Response_Action') OR (response_actions_wri = 'road_closure') OR (response_actions_wri = 'Staging_Area') OR (response_actions_wri = 'Tactical/Operational_Team')
where.displaySQL: (Response Actions = 'aid_station') or (Response Actions = 'Boat Ramp') or (Response Actions = 'current_boom_site') or (Response Actions = 'hospital') or (Response Actions = 'Incident Command Post') or (Response Actions = 'Landing Zone') or (Response Actions = 'Other Action') or (Response Actions = 'planned_boom_site') or (Response Actions = 'Planned_Staging_Area') or (Response Actions = 'Planned_Staging_Area') or (Response Actions = 'Response Action') or (Response Actions = 'road_closure') or (Response Actions = 'Staging Area') or (Response Actions = 'Tactical/Operational Team')
